subparts.text: Distinguish between internal and external business environments
What is environmental analysis? Mention two of its limitations.
List any two economic issues affecting India today.
Explain the concept of the demographic dividend.
What is the Twin Balance Sheet problem?
Mention any two characteristics of the Indian service sector.
Write a brief note on WTO and its role in international trade.
What is FEMA? How does it regulate foreign exchange?

questions.question_text: Define the business environment. Describe its types and explain the role of environmental analysis in strategic decision-making.
Explain the structure of the Indian economy. How do the concepts of growth and development apply to the Indian context? CO Mapping
Discuss the objectives of economic planning in India. Highlight the key initiatives taken by NITI Aayog.
Discuss any four major problems of the Indian economy. Suggest relevant solutions to any one of them. CO Mapping
Compare public sector enterprises and private sector enterprises. Explain the relevance of MSMEs in India’s economy.
Explain the key features and impact of the Industrial Policy of 1991. What is the significance of disinvestment in India? CO Mapping
Explain the structure of the Indian financial system. Discuss the role of RBI and the money market.
Discuss the foreign trade policy of India. What role does FDI play in the development of the Indian economy?
